---
title: "Teaching & Open Educational Resources"
toc: true
---

EUR_DATA is built around two modules at University College Dublin that integrate
the study of EU politics with hands-on data analytics. The teaching materials
below are released as **open educational resources** under
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/): you are free to reuse
and adapt them with attribution.

## Modules

### INRL20160 — The Politics of the EU (undergraduate)

An introduction to the institutions, actors, and policy processes of the
European Union.

| Year | Syllabus |
|------|----------|
| 2025-2026 | [PDF](oer/syllabi/INRL20160_Syllabus_2526.pdf) |
| 2024-2025 | [PDF](oer/syllabi/INRL20160_Syllabus_2425.pdf) |
| 2023-2024 | [PDF](oer/syllabi/INRL20160_Syllabus_2324.pdf) |

### POL40970 — The Politics of European Governance (postgraduate)

A graduate module on European governance, combining institutional analysis with
quantitative methods and project-based work on real EU data.

| Year | Syllabus |
|------|----------|
| 2025-2026 | [PDF](oer/syllabi/POL40970_202526.pdf) |
| 2024-2025 | [PDF](oer/syllabi/POL40970_202425.pdf) |
| 2023-2024 | [PDF](oer/syllabi/POL40970_202324.pdf) |

## Lecture slides

Slide decks from the modules will be published here. *Coming soon.*

## Assessment materials

Anonymised project briefs and assessment templates, suitable for reuse in other
courses, will be published here. *Coming soon.*

## Working with the data in teaching

The [Commission Formation dataset](data.qmd) is designed for classroom use. The
worked example notebook in the repository shows how to load and explore the
tables:
[exploration.ipynb](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/notebooks/exploration.ipynb).
